About the art

Food, culture &
kawaii vibes.

I've been drawing since I was a kid — sticker art is how I unwind. Most of my illustration work is food-themed: Vietnamese dishes I grew up eating, Asian street food, and kawaii comfort food that makes people smile.

Process: Hand-sketched outlines, digitally colored and refined. Each design gets printed as real stickers — my favorite part is seeing them on water bottles, laptops, and journals.

See more at @fromluckybear on Instagram — reels, DIY projects, and behind-the-scenes of the illustration process.
